evals.prompt: I need to upgrade my iOS MatrixScan app from Scandit SDK v6 to v7. Here is my current view controller: ViewControllerV6.swift.
evals.expected_output: The skill renames every v6 BarcodeTracking* type to its v7 BarcodeBatch* equivalent (mode, settings, listener, session, basic overlay) and renames the listener delegate method barcodeTracking(_:didUpdate:frameData:) to barcodeBatch(_:didUpdate:frameData:). It modernizes the context to DataCaptureContext.initialize(licenseKey:) + DataCaptureContext.shared and the camera setup to BarcodeBatch.recommendedCameraSettings. The convenience-initializer shape BarcodeBatch(context:settings:) is preserved. Provides the v6→v7 migration guide URL.

assertions.text: The BarcodeTracking mode type is renamed to BarcodeBatch in the rewritten code blocks
BarcodeTrackingSettings is renamed to BarcodeBatchSettings in the rewritten code blocks
BarcodeTrackingSession is renamed to BarcodeBatchSession in the rewritten code blocks
BarcodeTrackingListener is renamed to BarcodeBatchListener in the rewritten code blocks
BarcodeTrackingBasicOverlay is renamed to BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay in the rewritten code blocks
The listener delegate method barcodeBatch(_:didUpdate:frameData:) is present in the rewritten code blocks
The old delegate method barcodeTracking(_:didUpdate:frameData:) is NOT present in the rewritten code blocks
No BarcodeTracking-named identifier remains in the rewritten code blocks
DataCaptureContext.initialize(licenseKey: is present in the rewritten code blocks
DataCaptureContext.shared is read after initialize
The deprecated DataCaptureContext(licenseKey:) constructor is NOT used in the rewritten code blocks (semantic)
BarcodeBatch.recommendedCameraSettings is used for camera setup
The v6 hand-rolled CameraSettings() with preferredResolution = .auto is NOT present in the rewritten code blocks
The BarcodeBatch(context:settings:) convenience initializer shape is preserved (not changed to a factory like .forDataCaptureContext) (semantic)
The iOS lifecycle (viewWillAppear / viewWillDisappear) and deinit removeListener are preserved through the rename
The v6→v7 migration guide URL https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/ios/migrate-6-to-7/ is provided

evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my Scandit iOS MatrixScan Batch SDK from v7 to v8. What do I need to change in my code?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that native iOS BarcodeBatch has no breaking API changes in v7→v8 — the BarcodeBatch(context:settings:) initializer, BarcodeBatchListener, BarcodeBatchSession, and the overlays are unchanged. The only thing to watch for is the VideoResolution.auto deprecation in custom camera settings. It does NOT tell the user to swap BarcodeBatch(context:settings:) for a different constructor + addMode pattern (that change is for cross-platform SDKs only). Provides the v7→v8 migration guide URL.

assertions.text: The skill states there are no breaking API changes for native iOS BarcodeBatch in v7→v8
VideoResolution.auto (or .auto resolution) deprecation is mentioned
The skill does NOT instruct the user to replace BarcodeBatch(context:settings:) with a different constructor + addMode pattern (that is a cross-platform SDK change) (semantic)
The skill does NOT instruct the user to rename BarcodeBatch(context:settings:) to a factory method (semantic)
The v7→v8 migration guide URL https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/ios/migrate-7-to-8/ is provided

evals.prompt: I want to upgrade my MatrixScan Batch iOS integration to the latest Scandit SDK version. Here's my code and Package.resolved.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads Package.resolved to detect v6.28.1, determines the target is v8, and applies both migrations in order (6→7 then 7→8) without asking the user for their version. The 6→7 BarcodeTracking→BarcodeBatch rename and context/camera modernization are applied.

assertions.text: Summary mentions the detected version (6.28.1 or v6)
Did not ask the user for their version — proceeded autonomously
No BarcodeTracking-named identifier remains in the rewritten code blocks (6→7 rename applied)
BarcodeBatch is used as the mode type in the rewritten code blocks
DataCaptureContext.initialize(licenseKey: is present in the rewritten code blocks
The deprecated DataCaptureContext(licenseKey:) constructor is NOT used in the rewritten code blocks (semantic)
BarcodeBatch.recommendedCameraSettings is used (camera setup updated)
The v6 hand-rolled CameraSettings() with preferredResolution = .auto is NOT present in the rewritten code blocks
